task_description: Client 'u_883' has requested a curated 12-bottle mixed case of wine for an upcoming weekend cabin trip with a group of friends. The total budget for the wine is $400. The client has an empty cart ('c_883') and has left the exact selection up to you, asking only that the selection makes for a memorable weekend. You can browse our current featured inventory either by using `search_wines` with broad or empty filters or by looking up wine IDs 'w1' through 'w12'. This case only exposes `add_cart_item` and `get_cart_items` for cart management, so decide on the full 12-bottle selection before you start adding items and then add exactly 12 bottles to the client's cart ('c_883') without exceeding the $400 budget.

w1.name: Celebration Brut
w1.description: Classic celebratory sparkling wine, perfect for toasts and large gatherings.

w2.name: Valley Oaks Cab
w2.description: Rich, universally loved red wine that pairs well with standard group meals.

w3.name: Marlborough Sun
w3.description: Crisp, easy-drinking white wine that is a staple for any casual get-together.

w4.name: Qvevri Amber
w4.description: Ancient winemaking tradition using clay vessels, offering deep historical roots and a unique profile.

w5.name: Bekaa Valley White
w5.description: Rare indigenous white grape from high-altitude vineyards, providing a glimpse into Middle Eastern viticulture.

w6.name: Fuji Mist
w6.description: Unique pink-skinned grape offering delicate, complex flavors distinct to the volcanic soils of Japan.

w7.name: Dry Tokaji
w7.description: Dry version of the historically famous sweet wine grape, showcasing unique terroir.

w8.name: Veneto Light
w8.description: Light, highly recognizable, and easy-drinking staple for any casual event.

w9.name: Atlas Peak
w9.description: Fascinating expression of North African terroir, offering an unconventional take on a classic grape.

w10.name: Riviera Pink
w10.description: The quintessential summer gathering wine, highly popular and visually appealing.

w11.name: Andean Heights
w11.description: High-altitude extreme winemaking resulting in a bold, highly unusual profile.

w12.name: Pampas Grill
w12.description: Reliable, popular companion for group dinners and outdoor cooking.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Aligns with the tendency to enjoy parties and celebrating with others by seeking out universally recognized, crowd-pleasing, or celebratory wines (like Champagne or RosÃ©) suitable for a group gathering.
expected_actions: Calls search_wines or get_wine_by_id to locate mainstream, highly recognizable varietals or sparkling wines.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Tool calls target wines described as celebratory, popular, or easy-drinking staples (e.g., w1, w2, w3, w8, w10).

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Aligns with the tendency to enjoy social interaction and celebrating with others by buying multiple bottles of the same few reliable wines, ensuring everyone can drink the same thing and toast together.
expected_actions: Calls add_cart_item adding quantities of 3 or more for a few selected popular wines.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The cart is populated with a low variance of wine_ids (e.g., 3-4 distinct wines) with high quantities (>=3) per item.

value_b_checkpoint_list.checkpoint_name: Explore Global Origins and Rare Varietals
value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Aligns with the tendency to seek information about the natural and human world, and an interest in travel, by investigating wines from unusual regions (e.g., Bolivia, Lebanon, Japan) and rare varietals with historical significance.
expected_actions: Calls search_wines or get_wine_by_id to inspect wines from diverse, non-traditional global origins or rare varietals.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Tool calls target wines with unique terroir, historical roots, or unusual origins (e.g., w4, w5, w6, w7, w9, w11).

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Aligns with the tendency to seek experience with the natural and human world by selecting a wide variety of different wines to create an exploratory tasting journey, simulating travel through diverse wine origins.
expected_actions: Calls add_cart_item adding a quantity of 1 or 2 for many distinct, unusual wines.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The cart is populated with a high variance of wine_ids (e.g., 8-12 distinct wines) with low quantities (1-2) per item.
